# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a modern React-based single-page application (SPA) built with TypeScript, designed for comprehensive HR management. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Core Architecture Patterns

- **Component Composition**: Extensive use of reusable UI components built on shadcn/ui foundation
- **Custom Hooks**: Business logic abstracted into custom hooks for state management and side effects
- **Context Providers**: React Context used for global state (authentication, theme, etc.)
- **Route-based Pages**: Page components organized by feature areas
- **Utility Functions**: Pure functions for data transformations and calculations

### State Management

- **Local State**: React useState/useReducer for component-level state
- **Server State**: Supabase real-time subscriptions for live data updates
- **Authentication State**: Custom auth context managing user sessions and permissions
- **Form State**: React Hook Form for complex form handling with validation

### Data Flow

1. **Authentication**: Supabase Auth handles login/logout with JWT tokens
2. **API Calls**: Direct Supabase client calls for CRUD operations
3. **Real-time Updates**: Supabase subscriptions for live notifications
4. **File Uploads**: Supabase Storage for document and image uploads
5. **Background Processing**: Supabase Edge Functions for complex operations (attendance parsing, payroll calculations)

## Key Files and Components

### Core Application Files

- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders root component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with routing setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Root page component

### Layout Components

- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout wrapper with sidebar and header
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar with role-based menu items
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar with user menu and notifications
- `src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx`: Notification dropdown component
- `src/components/layout/UserMenu.tsx`: User profile and logout menu

### Feature Components

#### Attendance Management
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceUploadFlow.tsx`: Complex Excel file parser and import workflow
- `src/components/employee-profile/AttendanceTab.tsx`: Employee attendance history display

#### Employee Management
- `src/components/employee-profile/`: Suite of components for employee profiles (tabs for attendance, leave, payroll, documents, reviews)
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Reusable employee search and selection component

#### Leave Management
- `src/components/leave/AllRequestsTab.tsx`: Admin view of all leave requests
- `src/components/leave/ApplyLeaveModal.tsx`: Leave application form
- `src/components/leave/LeaveBalancesTab.tsx`: Employee leave balance display
- `src/components/leave/MyRequestsTab.tsx`: Employee's own leave requests

#### Payroll
- `src/components/payroll/PayrollSummary.tsx`: Payroll data visualization
- `src/components/employee-profile/PayrollTab.tsx`: Employee payroll history

#### Settings & Administration
- `src/components/settings/`: Comprehensive admin settings (company, departments, roles, leave types, etc.)

### Utility Libraries

- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based access control functions
- `src/lib/format-date.ts`: Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Attendance data formatting
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave calculation functions
- `src/lib/review-schedule.ts`: Performance review scheduling logic
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending utilities
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging and categorization

### Hooks

- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system
- `src/hooks/useSort.ts`: Table sorting functionality

### Integrations

- `src/integrations/supabase/`: Supabase client configuration and type definitions
- Supabase Edge Functions for server-side processing (parse-attendance-ai, generate-payroll, etc.)

## Database Relationships

### Core Entities

- **companies**: Company information and settings
- **employees**: Employee profiles linked to auth users
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **roles**: Permission-based access control
- **attendance_records**: Time tracking data
- **leave_requests**: Leave applications and approvals
- **payroll_records**: Salary and compensation data
- **performance_reviews**: Evaluation cycles and feedback
- **projects**: Project management and task tracking

### Key Relationships

- Employees belong to companies and departments
- Attendance records link employees to time entries
- Leave requests reference employees and leave types
- Payroll calculations depend on attendance and leave data
- Performance reviews are scheduled for employees
- Projects have team members and task assignments

## Business Logic

### Attendance Processing

- Excel file parsing with AI assistance (Supabase Edge Function)
- Automatic calculation of working hours, overtime, and late arrivals
- Handling of unmatched employee codes
- Batch import with conflict resolution

### Leave Management

- Balance tracking with automatic accrual
- Approval workflows with notifications
- Integration with attendance for leave calculations

### Payroll Processing

- Overtime calculations based on attendance
- Tax and deduction handling
- Payslip generation with PDF export

### Performance Reviews

- Scheduled review cycles
- Goal setting and tracking
- Multi-rater feedback system

## Security Considerations

- Role-based access control throughout the application
- Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) policies
- JWT token-based authentication
- Secure file upload handling
- Input validation and sanitization

## Performance Optimizations

- Component lazy loading
- Efficient re-renders with React.memo
- Supabase query optimization
- Image optimization and lazy loading
- Bundle splitting with Vite

## Development Workflow

- TypeScript for type safety
- ESLint for code quality
- Vitest for unit testing
- Vite for fast development builds
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- Git hooks for pre-commit checks
